# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '20'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application
      run: npm run build

    - name: Create artifact directory
      run: mkdir -p build-artifacts

    - name: Copy compiled binaries
      run: cp -r dist build-artifacts/

    - name: Copy configuration files
      run: cp config/*.json build-artifacts/ || true

    - name: Copy deployment scripts
      run: cp scripts/*.sh build-artifacts/ || true

    - name: List build artifacts (for verification)
      run: ls -R build-artifacts/

    - name: Upload Build Artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: internal-build-distribution
        path: build-artifacts/
        retention-days: 7
